Headline: Yellow and Purple Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Yellow and Purple Line has been temporarily suspended due to track conditions near Howard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Yellow and Purple Line has been temporarily suspended due to track conditions near Howard.

Shuttle buses are available to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Yellow Line: Howard to Skokie in both directions.

Purple Line: Howard to Linden in both directions.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Howard and Thorndale
ShortDescription: Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between Howard and Thorndale due to track conditions near Howard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between Howard and Thorndale due to track conditions.

As a result, trains are operating only between 95th and Thorndale at this time.

Shuttle buses are available between Howard and Thorndale to provide connecting service.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#151 Sheridan 

#22 Clark

#97 Skokie

#36 Broadway

#147 Outer Drive Express 

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
